emails.subject: Agave Plant
emails.body: Agave Plant Kim, Per our conversation yesterday after the morning meeting, Sue and I would like to get together with you to go over Agave's plan for a future Park Ride agreement. Would you let us know what time is good for you? Thanks. Reyna Cabrera (713) 853-3072

emails.subject: RE: Agave Plant
emails.body: RE: Agave Plant How about Friday about 10:00 ro 10:30? Kim. To: Watson, Kimberly; Neville, Sue

emails.subject: RE: Agave Plant
emails.body: Do you have open conference rooms on your floor? If not, we have a great conference room in 1336 that is just for us. Just let me know. Thanks, Kim. To: Watson, Kimberly; Neville, Sue

emails.subject: RE: Agave Plant
emails.body: I'll be there. Thanks, Kim. To: Watson, Kimberly; Neville, Sue
